content.introduction: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF (VXUS) and Fidelity Zero International Index Fund (FZILX) are top picks for 2026, offering broad exposure to international markets. Xtrackers MSCI EAFE Hedged Equity ETF (DBEF) and Schwab Fundamental International Equity Index Fund (SFNNX) also provide strong international exposure.
